coverage_note: The bundled HLA-DQA1 population database is literature oriented and does not include a complete allele-frequency panel. Interpretation should remain ancestry-, phenotype-, tissue-, assay-, and LD-aware.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from HLA-DQA1 asthma, atopy, airway, epithelial-barrier, and immune-inflammatory literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000196735: HLA-DQA1 coordinates and transcripts

gene_population_patterns.summary: rs9273349 is curated as a low-penetrance research signal in HLA-DQA1 or a linked locus; cohort design, ancestry, LD, and phenotype definition matter.
HLA-DQ haplotype model is curated as a low-penetrance research signal in HLA-DQA1 or a linked locus; cohort design, ancestry, LD, and phenotype definition matter.
HLA-DQA1 interpretation is most useful when sequence, methylation, expression, tissue, and allergic-immune phenotype evidence are integrated rather than treated as a single deterministic SNP call.
